name: OAuth Consent Phishing Detection & Revocation
description: Detects and remediates OAuth consent phishing attacks where victims are tricked into granting permissions to malicious applications. Identifies suspicious OAuth app consent grants, evaluates the app permissions and publisher, and revokes malicious app access. AI analysis assesses the risk level based on granted scopes (mail read, file access, etc.). Confirmed malicious apps are revoked, affected users are notified, and the app is reported. Critical for Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace environments.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Graph
required_integrations.reason: Revoke malicious OAuth app permissions and query consent grants

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify SOC and affected users about malicious OAuth app

data.title: OAuth Consent Phishing Alert
data.summary: Triggers on suspicious OAuth consent grants or illicit consent alerts

data.title: Extract App Details
data.summary: Parse OAuth application details, scopes, and affected user from the alert

script.code:
def main(alert):
    app_id = alert.get('app_id', alert.get('application_id', ''))
    app_name = alert.get('app_name', alert.get('application_name', 'Unknown App'))
    scopes = alert.get('scopes', alert.get('permissions', []))
    if isinstance(scopes, str):
        scopes = [s.strip() for s in scopes.split(',')]
    dangerous_scopes = ['Mail.Read', 'Mail.ReadWrite', 'Files.ReadWrite.All', 'User.ReadWrite.All', 'Directory.ReadWrite.All', 'offline_access']
    risky_scopes = [s for s in scopes if any(d.lower() in s.lower() for d in dangerous_scopes)]
    return {
        'app_id': app_id,
        'app_name': app_name,
        'publisher': alert.get('publisher', 'Unknown'),
        'scopes': scopes,
        'risky_scopes': risky_scopes,
        'scope_count': len(scopes),
        'has_dangerous_scopes': len(risky_scopes) > 0,
        'affected_user': alert.get('user', alert.get('affected_user', '')),
        'consent_time': alert.get('timestamp', '')
    }

data.title: AI OAuth Risk Assessment
data.summary: AI evaluates the OAuth app legitimacy, scope risk, and consent phishing indicators

config.custom_instructions: Assess OAuth consent phishing: evaluate the app name for impersonation of known services, check if granted scopes are excessive for the app's stated purpose, look for signs the consent was obtained through phishing (redirect from email link, urgency in original message), and assess data exposure risk from the granted permissions

data.title: Malicious App?
data.summary: Is the OAuth application confirmed as malicious or high-risk?

data.title: Revoke App Permissions
data.summary: Revoke the malicious OAuth application's access tokens and permissions

data.title: Reset User Sessions
data.summary: Invalidate all sessions for the affected user as a precaution

config.message: Invalidating all sessions for {{$.nodes.code-1.result.affected_user}} after malicious OAuth consent

data.title: Notify SOC & User
data.summary: Alert SOC and notify the affected user about the revoked app

data.title: Close — Legitimate App
data.summary: OAuth app consent is legitimate, close alert

config.note: OAuth app '{{$.nodes.code-1.result.app_name}}' assessed as legitimate. Scopes are appropriate for the app's purpose. No malicious indicators found.

data.title: End — App Revoked
data.summary: Malicious OAuth app revoked, user sessions reset, SOC notified

config.summary: Malicious OAuth consent phishing detected. App permissions revoked, user sessions invalidated, SOC notified.

data.title: End — Legitimate Consent
data.summary: App consent is legitimate, alert closed

config.summary: OAuth app consent assessed as legitimate. Alert closed.
